name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.8.0 -> 1.9.0): issue #472 — Inv 3(b) now requires dispatch-spec-create.py to report the dropped-file count loudly on stderr when the resolved file count exceeds the 50-file cap (no silent alphabetical truncation); contract provides.scripts gains a stderr field; new test/test-dispatch-truncation-not-silent.py enforces it.
